heroImage: https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/1f/Maserati_Ghibli_Spyder_in_Resale_Red%2C_front_right_%28CHMC%29.jpg/1920px-Maserati Ghibli Spyder in Resale Red, front right (CHMC).jpg
description: The Maserati Ghibli, produced from 2013 to 2023, was Maserati's mid-size executive saloon aimed at the BMW 5 Series and Mercedes E-Class. Powered by Ferrari-built 3.0-litre twin-turbo V6 engines producing up to 580 bhp in Trofeo form, it combined Italian style with daily usability.
